# BaZi Master · 全栈玄学排盘示例项目

> Open-source full-stack divination application combining BaZi (八字), Tarot (塔罗), I Ching (周易), Western Astrology (星座), and Zi Wei Dou Shu (紫微斗数) into a single React + Express + Prisma reference app. Default storage: SQLite. Production-recommended: PostgreSQL + Redis. **This is a reference / sample project** showing how to build a multi-modality divination platform with auth, history, AI interpretation streaming, OAuth, and i18n — not a hosted online fortune-telling service.

## Key docs

- [README.md](README.md): Full feature list, tech stack, dev setup, environment variables, deployment notes.

## What this project demonstrates

- **BaZi (八字) charting** with caching, duplicate-record detection on save, and login-gated AI interpretation + history
- **Tarot (塔罗)** card drawing (public) + AI interpretation (logged-in)
- **I Ching (周易)** divination by number or by time + AI interpretation
- **Western astrology (星座)** — basic profiles, daily fortunes, ascendant calculation, pairing/compatibility
- **Zi Wei Dou Shu (紫微斗数)** charting and history
- **Synastry (合盘)** chart-pair analysis
- **Daily fortune** calendar endpoint (personalized when birth-date is supplied)
- **Soul Portrait** AI-image generation
- **History management** with client-side search/filter and batch operations, favorites, and snapshot saves
- **Auth surface**: email signup/login + session tokens + logout + self-serve account deletion + password reset + Google / WeChat OAuth
- **i18n preferences** per user
- **Operational endpoints**: `/health`, `/api/ready`, admin `/api/admin/health`, WebSocket streaming `/ws/ai`

## What this is NOT

- ❌ Not a SaaS / hosted online divination service. It's a reference codebase for one.
- ❌ Not a claim of fortune-telling accuracy — output is generated by language models and astrology libraries; treat as entertainment / cultural exploration, not life advice.
- ❌ Not a production binary distribution — you fork it, configure your DB and AI provider keys, and deploy it yourself.
- ❌ Not for any platform's commercial divination policy review (Apple, WeChat, etc. each have their own rules — you must verify before publishing).

## Tech stack

- **Frontend**: React 18, Vite, React Router v6, react-i18next, Tailwind CSS (in `frontend/`)
- **Backend**: Node.js 20+, Express 4, Prisma ORM, Pino logging
- **Database**: SQLite (dev default) or PostgreSQL (production-recommended)
- **Cache / session**: Optional Redis (sessions, BaZi cache, OAuth state, password-reset tokens) — falls back to in-memory when not configured
- **Testing**: Node's native `test` runner (backend in `backend/test/`), Playwright (frontend E2E in `frontend/tests/`)

## Common questions

- **Can I run it without an AI key?** The non-AI surface (BaZi/Tarot/I Ching chart calculation, history, auth, daily-fortune calendar) works without an AI key. AI interpretation and Soul Portrait require an AI provider.
- **Why both SQLite and PostgreSQL?** SQLite for zero-config local development; PostgreSQL recommended for production because of concurrent-write behavior, JSONB queries on chart blobs, and proper backup tooling.
- **Is Redis required?** No. The app falls back to in-memory storage for sessions / OAuth state / password reset / BaZi cache when Redis isn't configured. Production multi-instance deployments **should** use Redis (otherwise sessions don't survive process restart or instance switch).
- **WeChat OAuth — does it work outside mainland China?** WeChat OAuth requires a WeChat Open Platform app registered for the relevant region; configuration is in the OAuth provider section of the backend env.
- **WebSocket AI streaming — what's the protocol?** Token-streaming chat over `/ws/ai`; client connects, sends a request payload, receives token-by-token AI output. Backend bridges to whichever AI provider you configured.

## Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/tytsxai/bazi-master
- License: see LICENSE
- Stack: React 18 + Vite + Tailwind / Node 20 + Express 4 + Prisma / SQLite or PostgreSQL / optional Redis
- Author: tytsxai
- Status: Reference / sample project; treat output as cultural / entertainment
